update-docs.description: Update docs/ based on changes to src/arthur_observability_sdk/

generate-client.description: Regenerate src/arthur_genai_client/ from the GenAI Engine OpenAPI spec

test-unit.description: Run the SDK unit tests (pytest -m unit_tests)

test-integration.description: Run the SDK integration tests — builds the wheel and verifies end-to-end telemetry (pytest -m integration_tests)
